# SCEAD Foundation India
> Space for Children in Education, Art and Development

## About
SCEAD Foundation India is a registered non-profit organization (NGO) founded in 1998 by Siju Thomas Daniel in Bengaluru, Karnataka, India. Registration: GAN-04-00209. 80G Registration: AAITS0428E25BL02. 12A Registration: AAITS0428E25BL01. CSR-1 Verified.

The foundation is dedicated to environmental sustainability, education, tribal welfare, women's empowerment, elderly care, disaster relief, and community development among marginalized communities across India.

## Impact (as of 2026)
- 500,000+ lives impacted
- 200,000+ trees planted and lakes restored
- 300,000+ women empowered through livelihood programs
- 50,000+ vulnerable youth aided
- 500+ sanitation units built
- 35 government schools adopted
- 15,000+ tribal beneficiaries through livestock distribution
- 300+ international volunteers from 17 countries
- 25+ years of continuous grassroots work since 1998
- 10+ CSR corporate partners

## Core Programs
1. Environmental Sustainability — Large-scale plantation drives (Bengaluru, Anekal, Jigani, Bannerghatta, Shillong, Metur Dam), lake rejuvenation, CERA-verified carbon sequestration, Governor of Karnataka Million Trees Project, Genpact "Sowing Seeds of Sustainability"
2. Education & Child Welfare — 35 government schools adopted (since 2011), anti-child labor campaigns, street children rescue, health screening, summer schools, HIV orphanage (Snehalaya Children's Home, 20+ years), Girl Child Orphanage, Save Girl Child Campaign
3. Community Development & Women Empowerment — Livestock distribution (cows, calves, sheep, goats), 500+ sanitation units, skill development and tailoring training, Saukhyam reusable sanitary pad production training, peace and social harmony initiatives
4. Elderly Care — Comprehensive care across tribal, rural, and urban communities, powered by Ascend Telecom CSR partnership
5. Disaster Relief — Turkey earthquake relief (2023), COVID-19 relief (12,000 kg food distributed, acknowledged by US Secretary of State Mike Pompeo)

## Recognition & Endorsements
- US Secretary of State Mike Pompeo tweeted about SCEAD's COVID-19 relief work (2020)
- Mr. Erik Solheim, former UN Environment Executive Director, visited SCEAD Foundation (2023)
- Governor of Karnataka flagged off Million Trees Project at Raj Bhavan (2022)
- Diplomatic support from consulates of Italy, Japan, Germany, Canada, UK, Australia, and France
- Sri Harsha Vardhan, IRS Commissioner Customs & GST — Senior Adviser
- Ms Nisha James, IPS — Adviser on Women and Child
- Suraj Kumar Verma, IPS — Member

## CSR Compliance
- 80G Registration: AAITS0428E25BL02 (tax exemption for donors)
- 12A Registration: AAITS0428E25BL01/AAITS0428E
- CSR-1 Registration: Verified
- 100% clean audit histories (3 years certified reports)
- 10+ years continuous Income Tax Return filing
- Never blacklisted by any government authority
- Not involved in any political activities

## Leadership
- Siju Thomas Daniel — Founder, Managing Trustee & Director of Projects
- Harsha Vardhan Umre, IRS — Senior Adviser (Commissioner Customs & GST)
- Ms Nisha James, IPS — Adviser on Women and Child
- Suraj Kumar Verma, IPS — Member (SP Indore)
- V Ganapathy — Trustee, Head of Kerala Project
- Shibu Daniel — Member & Trustee
- Mr Sudhindranath Vasudevan — Senior Adviser & Auditor
- Arun Shiva Ganesh — Social Entrepreneur & Child Rights Activist
- Prof. Mohit Verma — Vice President, SCEAD Chandigarh
- Nikhil Jha — Technical Adviser, Head of Volunteers Australia

## Corporate Partners
Genpact Private Limited, Ascend Telecom, Anthem Biosciences, Zentree Labs, IDA Interior Design Associates, St. Joseph's Institutions, Tower Vision India, Mysore Wifiltronics Pvt. Ltd., Prashanti Uniforms, Rotary Club of Bangalore Aagneya, IPYG, AIESEC, HWPL, Christ University, St Joseph's College of Commerce, Jindal Global Law School, Candor International School, HCG Cancer Centre

## Offices

- Mumbai: Social Nagar, M.G. Road, Sion — Dharavi, Mumbai 400022
- Chandigarh: Led by Prof. Mohit Verma
